subject: English
source: National Curriculum Framework for School Education (NCF-SE), Section 2.4.1.1 — Language 1 (R1)

CG-1.label: Oral Communication and Presentation
CG-1.description: Develops oral language skills using complex sentence structures to understand and communicate ideas coherently

competency_codes.C-1.1: Converses fluently and meaningfully in different contexts
competency_codes.C-1.2: Summarises core ideas from material read out in class
competency_codes.C-1.3: Makes oral presentations (show and tell, short welcome notes, anchoring of small events, short speeches, class debates)

CG-2.label: Reading Comprehension
CG-2.description: Develops the ability to read with comprehension by gaining a basic understanding of different forms of familiar and unfamiliar texts (such as prose and poetry)

competency_codes.C-2.1: Applies varied comprehension strategies (inferring, predicting, visualising) to understand different texts
competency_codes.C-2.2: Understands main ideas and draws essential conclusions from the material read

CG-3.label: Written Expression and Grammar
CG-3.description: Develops the ability to write simple and compound sentence structures to express their understanding and experiences

competency_codes.C-3.1: Uses writing strategies, such as sequencing, identifying headings/sub-headings, the beginning, and ending, and forming paragraphs
competency_codes.C-3.2: Writes clear and coherent paragraphs that convey their understanding of a given topic/concept or on a reading of a text
competency_codes.C-3.3: Creates posters, invites, simple poems, stories, and dialogues with appropriate information and purpose
competency_codes.C-3.4: Uses appropriate grammar and structure in their writing

CG-4.label: Vocabulary Development
CG-4.description: Acquires a more comprehensive range of words in various contexts (of home and school experience) through different sources

competency_codes.C-4.1: Discusses meanings of words and develops vocabulary by listening to and reading a variety of texts
competency_codes.C-4.2: Discusses meanings of words and develops vocabulary by listening to and reading a variety of texts or other content areas

CG-5.label: Reading Habit and Library Use
CG-5.description: Develops interest and preferences in reading

competency_codes.C-5.1: Borrows books from the Library regularly to read at home
competency_codes.C-5.2: Demonstrates interest in reading books from the Library
